compatible_devices.notes: Built-in chemically resistant low-voltage peristaltic dosing pump; automatically dispenses pH Up or pH Down into reservoir to maintain target pH; pH setpoint range 5.0–8.0; adjustable dosing time, mixing time, dead band, and max dosing cycles; data logger records min/max pH; compatible with any water-based hydroponic nutrient solution (any brand); no external dosing pump output — dosing is fully integrated

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: PHOTO LOC 0-10V Cable Kit CHC882000B required for PHOTOBIO X, M, T, T Duo series (included or sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: Built-in glass pH probe and temperature sensor with automatic temperature compensation; optional APCEPH1SK sampling kit (sold separately) improves accuracy by providing continuous flow across sensors: includes submersible pump 300 LPH/80 GPH (6 ft lift), 3/4 in × 5 ft tubing, and molded sensor assembly with mounting bracket for reservoir installation; probe calibration required periodically
